name: Grilled Eggplant with Almond, Yogurt and Coriander Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 large eggplant or 2 small, sliced 1/2-inch thick
1/2 cup peeled, seeded, diced tomatoes (tomato concasse)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill.
2. In a food processor, combine almonds, coriander, garlic, honey, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Process until smooth.
3. With the machine running, add yogurt a little at a time, stirring continuously.
4. Stir in parsley and cilantro by hand.
5. Adjust seasonings to taste.
6. Brush eggplant slices with oil and season generously with salt and pepper.
7. Grill for 3 minutes on each side.
8. Serve hot, topped with a generous drizzle of sauce and garnished with chopped tomatoes.
Yield: 2 servings (About 1 1/4 cups of sauce)
